# opengem-data-bis

🧪 alpha

BIS Data Portal adapter — central bank policy rates (CBPOL) for 40+ economies.
Per R02 §4, this is the **near-free vintage policy rate record** for all OPENGEM
Tier-V countries; the rate decisions are dated events not subject to revision.

## Coverage

Policy rates for: AR, AU, BR, CA, CN, HR, CZ, EA member states (BE, DE, FR, GR, IT, NL, PT),
GR, HK, HU, IS, IN, ID, IL, JP, KR, KW, MK, MY, MX, MA, NZ, NO, PE, PH, PL, RO, RU,
SA, SG, ZA, KR, SE, CH, TH, TR, UK, US.

## Catalog (auto-generated)

`<country>.BIS.CBPOL.policy_rate.D` — daily series for each of 40+ central banks.

## Access

BIS Data Portal SDMX endpoint, no auth required.
